entries.name: Rake
entries.desc:
Rake the target for 10 Bleed damage and an additional 57 Bleed damage over 15 sec.

Awards 1 combo point.

entries.name: Frenzied Regeneration
entries.desc: Heals you for 32% health over 3 sec.

entries.name: Rejuvenation
entries.desc: Heals the target for 1,672 over 12 sec.

entries.name: Starfire
entries.desc:
Call down a burst of energy, causing 386 Arcane damage to the target, and 271 Arcane damage to all other enemies within 10 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Generates 8 Astral Power.

entries.name: Grievous Wounds
entries.desc: Rake, Rip, and Thrash damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Swipe
entries.desc: Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

entries.name: Ursoc's Spirit
entries.desc:
Stamina increased by 4%.

Stamina in Bear Form is increased by an additional 5%.

entries.name: Wild Growth
entries.desc: Heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for 1,085 over 7 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration.

entries.name: Starsurge
entries.desc: Launch a surge of stellar energies at the target, dealing 1,306 Astral damage.

entries.name: Rip
entries.desc:
Finishing move that causes Bleed damage over time. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : 8 over 1 sec
   2 points: 12 over 2 sec
   3 points: 16 over 3 sec
   4 points: 20 over 3 sec
   5 points: 24 over 4 sec

entries.name: Verdant Heart
entries.desc: Frenzied Regeneration and Barkskin increase all healing received by 20%.

entries.name: Remove Corruption
entries.desc: Nullifies corrupting effects on the friendly target, removing all Curse and Poison effects.

entries.name: Moonkin Form
entries.desc:
Shapeshift into Moonkin Form, increasing the damage of your spells by 10% and your armor by 125%, and granting protection from Polymorph effects.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

entries.name: Maim
entries.desc:
Finishing move that causes Physical damage and stuns the target. Damage and duration increased per combo point:

   1 point  : 5 damage, 1 sec
   2 points: 10 damage, 2 sec
   3 points: 15 damage, 3 sec
   4 points: 20 damage, 4 sec
   5 points: 25 damage, 5 sec

entries.name: Killer Instinct
entries.desc: Physical damage and Armor increased by 6%.

entries.name: Ironfur
entries.desc: Increases armor by 124 for 7 sec.

entries.name: Improved Barkskin
entries.desc: Barkskin's duration is increased by 4 sec.

entries.name: Hibernate
entries.desc: Forces the enemy target to sleep for up to 40 sec. Any damage will awaken the target. Only one target can be forced to hibernate at a time. Only works on Beasts and Dragonkin.

entries.name: Nurturing Instinct
entries.desc: Magical damage and healing increased by 6%.

entries.name: Sunfire
entries.desc: A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for 81 Nature damage and then an additional 705 Nature damage over 18 sec.

entries.name: Primal Fury
entries.desc:
While in Cat Form, when you critically strike with an attack that generates a combo point, you gain an additional combo point. Damage over time cannot trigger this effect.

Mangle critical strike damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Thick Hide
entries.desc: Reduces all damage taken by 4%.

entries.name: Light of the Sun
entries.desc: Reduces the remaining cooldown on Solar Beam by 15 sec when it interrupts the primary target.

entries.name: Natural Recovery
entries.desc: Healing you receive is increased by 4%.

entries.name: Astral Influence
entries.desc: Increases the range of all of your spells by 5 yards.

entries.name: Wild Charge
entries.desc: Fly to a nearby ally's position.

entries.name: Tiger Dash
entries.desc: Shift into Cat Form and increase your movement speed by 200%, reducing gradually over 5 sec.

entries.name: Soothe
entries.desc: Soothes the target, dispelling all enrage effects.

entries.name: Cyclone
entries.desc: Tosses the enemy target into the air, disorienting them but making them invulnerable for up to 5 sec. Only one target can be affected by your Cyclone at a time.

entries.name: Aessina's Renewal
entries.desc:
When a hit deals more than 12% of your maximum health, instantly heal for 10% of your health.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 30 seconds.

entries.name: Starlight Conduit
entries.desc:
Wrath, Starsurge, and Starfire damage increased by 5%. 

Starsurge's cooldown is reduced by 4 sec and its mana cost is reduced by 50%.

entries.name: Feline Swiftness
entries.desc: Increases your movement speed by 15%.

entries.name: Well-Honed Instincts
entries.desc: When you fall below 40% health, you cast Frenzied Regeneration, up to once every 120 sec.

entries.name: Matted Fur
entries.desc: When you use Barkskin or Survival Instincts, absorb 525 damage for 15 sec.

entries.name: Stampeding Roar
entries.desc: Shift into Bear Form and let loose a wild roar, increasing the movement speed of all friendly players within 15 yards by 60% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Lingering Healing
entries.desc:
Rejuvenation's duration is increased by 3 sec.

Regrowth's duration is increased by 3 sec when cast on yourself.

entries.name: Typhoon
entries.desc: Blasts targets within 15 yards in front of you with a violent Typhoon, knocking them back and reducing their movement speed by 50% for 6 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

entries.name: Mass Entanglement
entries.desc: Roots the target and all enemies within 12 yards in place for 10 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

entries.name: Ursol's Vortex
entries.desc: Conjures a vortex of wind for 10 sec at the destination, reducing the movement speed of all enemies within 8 yards by 50%. The first time an enemy attempts to leave the vortex, winds will pull that enemy back to its center. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

entries.name: Oakskin
entries.desc: Survival Instincts and Barkskin reduce damage taken by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Perfectly-Honed Instincts
entries.desc: Well-Honed Instincts can trigger up to once every 90 sec.

entries.name: Instincts of the Claw
entries.desc: Ferocious Bite and Maul damage increased by 8%.

entries.name: Lycara's Teachings
entries.desc:
You gain 3% of a stat while in each form:

No Form: Haste
Cat Form: Critical Strike
Bear Form: Versatility
Moonkin Form: Mastery

entries.name: Lore of the Grove
entries.desc: Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Gale Winds
entries.desc: Increases Typhoon's radius by 20% and its range by 5 yds.

entries.name: Incessant Tempest
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Typhoon by 5 sec.

entries.name: Gift of the Wild
entries.desc: Mark of the Wild is 100% more effective on yourself.

entries.name: Incapacitating Roar
entries.desc: Shift into Bear Form and invoke the spirit of Ursol to let loose a deafening roar, incapacitating all enemies within 10 yards for 3 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

entries.name: Mighty Bash
entries.desc: Invokes the spirit of Ursoc to stun the target for 4 sec. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

entries.name: Ursine Vigor
entries.desc: For 4 sec after shifting into Bear Form, your health and armor are increased by 15%.

entries.name: Improved Stampeding Roar
entries.desc: Cooldown reduced by 60 sec.

entries.name: Circle of the Wild
entries.desc: Physical damage dealt by your abilities increased by 5%.

entries.name: Circle of the Heavens
entries.desc: Magical damage dealt by your spells increased by 5%.

entries.name: Lycara's Inspiration
entries.desc:
You gain a bonus while in each form inspired by the breadth of your Druidic knowledge:

No Form: 4% Magic Damage
Cat Form: 4% Stamina
Bear Form: 5% Movement Speed
Moonkin Form: 3% Area damage taken reduction

entries.name: Symbiotic Relationship
entries.desc: Form a bond with an ally. Your self-healing also heals your bonded ally for 10% of the amount healed. Your healing to your bonded ally also heals you for 8% of the amount healed.

entries.name: Forestwalk
entries.desc: Casting Regrowth increases your movement speed and healing received by 8% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Fluid Form
entries.desc:
Shred, Rake, and Skull Bash can be used in any form and shift you into Cat Form, if necessary. 

Mangle can be used in any form and shifts you into Bear Form. 

Wrath and Starfire shift you into Moonkin Form, if known.

entries.name: Heart of the Wild
entries.desc:
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for 6,514 over 7 sec.

Bear Form:
Increase your maximum health by 30% for 20 sec.

entries.name: Innervate
entries.desc: Infuse a friendly healer with energy, allowing them to cast spells without spending mana for 8 sec.

entries.name: Eclipse
entries.desc:
You may draw the sun and moon into alignment for 15 sec, empowering either your Nature or Arcane spells. Casting Wrath or Starfire changes what mode of Eclipse will be entered, and the two modes of Eclipse share a button and 32 sec cooldown.

 Eclipse (Solar)
Nature spells deal 15% additional damage and Wrath damage is increased by 40%.

 Eclipse (Lunar)
Arcane spells deal 15% additional damage and Starfire damage is increased by 40%.

entries.name: Shooting Stars
entries.desc: Moonfire and Sunfire damage over time has a chance to call down a falling star, dealing 260 Astral damage and generating 2 Astral Power.

entries.name: Solar Beam
entries.desc: Summons a beam of solar light over an enemy target's location, interrupting the target and silencing all enemies within the beam. Lasts 8 sec.

entries.name: Solstice
entries.desc: During the first 6 sec of every Eclipse, Shooting Stars fall 200% more often.

entries.name: Force of Nature
entries.desc:
Summons a stand of 3 Treants for 10 sec which immediately taunt and attack enemies in the targeted area.

Generates 20 Astral Power.

entries.name: Twin Moons
entries.desc: Moonfire deals 10% increased damage and also hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

entries.name: Improved Eclipse
entries.desc: Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse have one additional charge.

entries.name: Nature's Balance
entries.desc:
While in combat you generate 1 Astral Power every 2 sec.

While out of combat your Astral Power rebalances to 50 instead of depleting to empty.

entries.name: Umbral Intensity
entries.desc:
Solar Eclipse increases Wrath damage by an additional 10%. 

Lunar Eclipse increases Starfire damage by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Aetherial Kindling
entries.desc: Casting Starfall extends the duration of active Moonfires and Sunfires by 3.0 sec, up to 28 sec.

entries.name: Meteor Storm
entries.desc: Starfall deals its damage 100% faster.

entries.name: Wild Surges
entries.desc: Your Wrath and Starfire chance to critically strike is increased by 10% and they generate 2 additional Astral Power.

entries.name: Celestial Alignment
entries.desc: Celestial bodies align, maintaining both Eclipses and granting 10% haste for 15 sec.

entries.name: Soul of the Forest
entries.desc: Solar Eclipse increases Wrath's Astral Power generation by 40% and Lunar Eclipse increases Starfire's Astral Power generation by 40%.

entries.name: Sunseeker Mushroom
entries.desc:
Sunfire damage has a chance to grow a magical mushroom at a target's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing 1,010 Nature damage and then an additional 570 Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.

Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

entries.name: Wild Mushroom
entries.desc:
Grow a magical mushroom at the target enemy's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing 1,211 Nature damage and then an additional 684 Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.

Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

entries.name: Nature's Grace
entries.desc: When Eclipse ends or when you enter combat, enter a Dreamstate, reducing the cast time of your next 2 Starfires or Wraths by 30%.

entries.name: Elune's Challenge
entries.desc: When you exit Eclipse with less than 40 Astral Power, Wrath and Starfire's cast times are reduced by 20% for 15 sec or until you enter an Eclipse.

entries.name: Stellar Amplification
entries.desc: Starsurge increases the damage the target takes from your periodic effects and Shooting Stars by 16% for 5 sec. Reapplying this effect extends its duration, up to 20 sec.

entries.name: Whirling Stars
entries.desc: Celestial Alignment's cooldown is reduced by 60 seconds and it has two charges.

entries.name: Orbital Strike
entries.desc:
Celestial Alignment blasts all enemies in a targeted area for 1,018 Astral damage and applies Stellar Flare to them.

Reduces the cooldown of Celestial Alignment by 60 sec.

 Stellar Flare
Burns the target for 69 Astral damage, and then an additional 894 damage over 24 sec. If dispelled, causes 803 damage to the dispeller and blasts them upwards.

Generates 12 Astral Power.

entries.name: Touch the Cosmos
entries.desc:
Casting Wrath has a 15% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

Casting Starfire has a 20% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

entries.name: Meteorites
entries.desc: Every time Starfall drops a wave of stars, a meteorite also falls on up to 2 targets in its range, each dealing 85 Astral damage.

entries.name: Cosmic Rapidity
entries.desc: Your Moonfire and Sunfire deal damage 20% more frequently, also increasing the rate that Shooting Stars fall.

entries.name: Celestial Fire
entries.desc: Moonfire, Sunfire, and Shooting Stars damage increased by 8%.

entries.name: Astral Communion
entries.desc: Increases maximum Astral Power by 20. Entering Eclipse reduces the Astral Power cost of your next Starsurge or Starfall by 15.

entries.name: Hail of Stars
entries.desc: Casting a free Starsurge or Starfall grants Solstice for 3 sec.

entries.name: Starlord
entries.desc:
Starsurge and Starfall grant you 2% Haste for 20 sec or until you enter a new Eclipse.

Stacks up to 3 times. Gaining a stack does not refresh the duration.

entries.name: Sculpt the Stars
entries.desc: The cooldowns of Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse are reduced by 2 sec.

entries.name: Balance of All Things
entries.desc: Entering Eclipse increases your critical strike chance with Arcane or Nature spells by 20%, decreasing by 2% every 1 sec.

entries.name: Total Eclipse
entries.desc: Entering any Eclipse has a 10% chance to grant the benefits of both Lunar and Solar Eclipse.

entries.name: Starweaver
entries.desc: Starsurge has a 20% chance to make Starfall free. Starfall has a 40% chance to make Starsurge free.

entries.name: Rattle the Stars
entries.desc: Starsurge and Starfall deal 8% increased damage and their cost is reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Power of Goldrinn
entries.desc: Starsurge has a chance to summon the Spirit of Goldrinn, which immediately deals 974 Astral damage to the target.

entries.name: Sundered Firmament
entries.desc: Every other Eclipse creates a Fury of Elune at 25% effectiveness that follows your current target for 8 sec.

entries.name: Orbit Breaker
entries.desc: Every 30th Shooting Star calls down a Full Moon at 60% effectiveness upon its target.

entries.name: Incarnation: Chosen of Elune
entries.desc:
An improved Moonkin Form that grants both Eclipses, any learned Celestial Alignment bonuses, and 10% critical strike chance.

Lasts 20 sec. You may shapeshift in and out of this improved Moonkin Form for its duration.

entries.name: Convoke the Spirits
entries.desc:
Call upon the spirits for an eruption of energy, channeling a rapid flurry of 16 Druid spells and abilities over 4 sec.

You will cast Wild Growth, Swiftmend, Moonfire, Wrath, Regrowth, Rejuvenation, Rake, and Thrash on appropriate nearby targets, favoring your current shapeshift form.

entries.name: Fury of Elune
entries.desc:
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy that follows the enemy, dealing up to 1,133 Astral damage over 8 sec within its area. Damage reduced on secondary targets.

Generates 40 Astral Power over its duration.

entries.name: New Moon
entries.desc:
Deals 976 Astral damage to the target and empowers New Moon to become Half Moon. 

Generates 10 Astral Power.

entries.name: Umbral Embrace
entries.desc: Wrath and Starfire have a 20% chance to cause your next Wrath or Starfire cast during an Eclipse to become Astral and deal 75% additional damage.

entries.name: Harmony of the Heavens
entries.desc: Starsurge or Starfall increase your current Eclipse's Arcane or Nature damage bonus by an additional 2%, up to 6%.

entries.name: Elune's Guidance
entries.desc:
Incarnation: Chosen of Elune
Reduces the Astral Power cost of Starsurge by 10, and the Astral Power cost of Starfall by 12.

 Convoke the Spirits
Cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

entries.name: Denizen of the Dream
entries.desc: Your Moonfire and Sunfire have a chance to summon a Faerie Dragon to assist you in battle for 30 sec.

entries.name: Radiant Moonlight
entries.desc:
New Moon, Half Moon, and Full Moon deal 25% increased damage. Full Moon becomes Full Moon once more before resetting to New Moon.

Fury of Elune deals 50% increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

entries.name: Ascendant Eclipses
entries.desc: Activating an Eclipse makes your next Wrath or Starfire instant. The first 3 Starsurges or Starfalls you cast during each Eclipse deal 20% increased damage.

entries.name: Bounteous Bloom
entries.desc: Your Grove Guardians' healing is increased by 30%.

entries.name: Early Spring
entries.desc: Swiftmend and Wild Growth cooldowns reduced by 1 sec.

entries.name: Power of the Dream
entries.desc: Dream Surge heals 1 additional ally.

entries.name: Control of the Dream
entries.desc:
Time elapsed while your major abilities are available to be used or at maximum charges is subtracted from that ability's cooldown after the next time you use it, up to 15 seconds.

Affects Force of Nature, Celestial Alignment, and Convoke the Spirits.

entries.name: Protective Growth
entries.desc: Your Regrowth protects you, reducing damage you take by 8% while your Regrowth is on you.

entries.name: Grove's Inspiration
entries.desc:
Wrath and Starfire damage increased by 10%. 

Regrowth, Wild Growth, and Swiftmend healing increased by 9%.

entries.name: Potent Enchantments
entries.desc:
Orbital Strike damage increased by 30%, and damage of Stellar Flares it applies increased by 30%.

Whirling Stars increases the haste you gain during Celestial Alignment by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Treants of the Moon
entries.desc: Your Grove Guardians cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every 6 sec.

entries.name: Dream Surge
entries.desc: When Grove Guardians are summoned, they grow Dream Petals on your target, healing up to 3 nearby allies for 558.

entries.name: Blooming Infusion
entries.desc:
Every 5 Regrowths you cast makes your next Wrath, Starfire, or Entangling Roots instant and increases damage it deals by 100%.

Every 5 Starsurges you cast makes your next Regrowth or Entangling roots instant.

entries.name: Expansiveness
entries.desc: Your maximum mana is increased by 5%.

entries.name: Cenarius' Might
entries.desc: Swiftmend healing is increased by 20%.

entries.name: Power of Nature
entries.desc: Your Grove Guardians increase the healing of your Rejuvenation, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom by 10% while active.

entries.name: Durability of Nature
entries.desc: Your Force of Nature treants have 100% increased health.

entries.name: Harmony of the Grove
entries.desc: Each of your Grove Guardians increases your healing done by 5% while active.

entries.name: Spirit of the Thicket
entries.desc: Your Starfall damage is increased by 12% and your Starsurge damage is increased by 8%.

entries.name: Dryad's Dance
entries.desc: Dryads cause most of your Astral power generation to be increased by 10%.

entries.name: Sylvan Beckoning
entries.desc: Entering an Eclipse summons a Dryad to assist you for 8 sec, casting Starsurge dealing 579 Astral damage and Starfall at 200% effectiveness.

entries.name: The Light of Elune
entries.desc:
Moonfire damage has a chance to call down a Fury of Elune to follow your target for 3 sec.

 Fury of Elune
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy, dealing 419 Astral damage over 3 sec within its area.

Generates 15 Astral Power over its duration.

entries.name: Astral Insight
entries.desc:
Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc increases Arcane damage from spells and abilities by 10% while active.

Increases the duration and number of spells cast by Convoke the Spirits by 25%.

entries.name: Arcane Affinity
entries.desc: All Arcane damage from your spells and abilities is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Lunation
entries.desc: Your Arcane abilities reduce the cooldown of Lunar Beam by 3.0 sec.

entries.name: The Eternal Moon
entries.desc:
Further increases the power of Boundless Moonlight.

 Fury of Elune
The flash of energy now generates 6 Astral Power and its damage is increased by 50%.

 Full Moon
New Moon and Half Moon now also call down 1 Minor Moon.

entries.name: Lunar Insight
entries.desc: Moonfire deals 20% increased damage.

entries.name: Lunar Calling
entries.desc: Thrash now deals Arcane damage and its damage is increased by 12%.

entries.name: Glistening Fur
entries.desc: Bear Form and Moonkin Form reduce Arcane damage taken by 6% and all other magic damage taken by 3%.

entries.name: Stellar Command
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Lunar Beam by 30% and Fury of Elune by 15%.

entries.name: Moondust
entries.desc: Enemies affected by Moonfire are slowed by 20%.

entries.name: Elune's Grace
entries.desc: Using Wild Charge while in Bear Form or Moonkin Form incurs a 3 sec shorter cooldown.

entries.name: Moon Guardian
entries.desc: Free automatic Moonfires from Galactic Guardian generate 5 Rage.

entries.name: Atmospheric Exposure
entries.desc: Enemies damaged by Lunar Beam or Fury of Elune take 6% increased damage from you for 6 sec.

entries.name: Boundless Moonlight
entries.desc:
Fury of Elune
Fury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for 822 Astral damage.

 Full Moon
Full Moon calls down 2 Minor Moons that deal 713 Astral damage and generate 3 Astral Power.

entries.name: Bask in Moonlight
entries.desc:
Starsurge damage increased by 10%. 
Starfall damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Penumbral Swell
entries.desc: Lunar Eclipse increases Arcane damage by an additional 3%.

entries.name: Star Cascade
entries.desc: Gaining Astral Power with Wrath or Starfire has a 40% chance to launch a Starsurge at a victim at 70% effectiveness.
